Package org.eventb.core.tests.pom

Class AutoProverDeltaTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.pom.AutoProverDeltaTests
public class AutoProverDeltaTests extends BuilderTest
Tests ensuring that the automated prover is run only when needed.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    checkPSFile(int confidence, boolean manualProof, boolean broken)
    Checks that the PS file contains exactly one proof status and with the expected attributes.
    private void
    createPOFile()
     
    void
    enableLocalAutoProver()
     
    protected void
    runBuilder(boolean attempted, int confidence, boolean manualProof, boolean broken)
    Saves the PO file, then runs the builder and check the generated / modified PS file.
    private void
    setPO(Predicate goal, int stamp)
     
    private void
    setReviewed()
    Creates a proof of the PO making it reviewed.
    final void
    testChangedStampDischarged()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is attempted on a discharged PO that has changed (different stamp).
    final void
    testChangedStampDischargedReusable()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a discharged PO that has changed (different stamp), but where the proof is reusable.
    final void
    testChangedStampPending()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a pending PO that has changed (different stamp).
    final void
    testChangedStampReviewed()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is attempted on a reviewed PO that has changed (different stamp).
    final void
    testChangedStampReviewedReusable()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a reviewed PO that has changed (different stamp), but where the proof is reusable.
    final void
    testChangedStampUnattempted()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a yet unattempted PO that has changed (different stamp).
    final void
    testNewProvable()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is attempted and can succeed on a new PO.
    final void
    testNewUnprovable()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is attempted and can fail on a new PO.
    final void
    testSameStampDischarged()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a discharged PO that didn't change (same stamp).
    final void
    testSameStampPending()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a pending PO that didn't change (same stamp).
    final void
    testSameStampReviewed()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a reviewed PO that didn't change (same stamp).
    final void
    testSameStampUnattempted()
    Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a yet unattempted PO that didn't change (same stamp).

    • testSameStampDischarged

      public final void testSameStampDischarged() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a discharged PO that didn't change (same stamp).
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      public final void testSameStampReviewed() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a reviewed PO that didn't change (same stamp).

      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a pending PO that didn't change (same stamp).
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testSameStampUnattempted

      public final void testSameStampUnattempted() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a yet unattempted PO that didn't change (same stamp).
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      public final void testChangedStampDischarged() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that the auto-prover is attempted on a discharged PO that has changed (different stamp).
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      Ensures that the auto-prover is attempted on a reviewed PO that has changed (different stamp).
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a yet unattempted PO that has changed (different stamp).
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testChangedStampDischargedReusable

      public final void testChangedStampDischargedReusable() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a discharged PO that has changed (different stamp), but where the proof is reusable.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • testChangedStampReviewedReusable

      public final void testChangedStampReviewedReusable() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that the auto-prover is not attempted on a reviewed PO that has changed (different stamp), but where the proof is reusable.
